center.name: 迪纳加特群岛
center.summary: 迪纳加特群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、棕头穗鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the islands of Mindanao, Basilan Dinagat Islands Bohol, Leyte, Biliran and Samar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the southern Philippines on the islands of Mindanao and Dinagat Islands and Basilan
